     the Fermi energy is    -0.4672 ev

!    total energy              =   -6581.01927683 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.3E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26467975 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6580.75459708 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -138035.45776359 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   69672.94330709 Ry
